text: I feel like an observer at the intersection of learning and innovation. In the first image, there is the focused energy of a group engaged in discussion or learning—a collective inquiry into the world’s questions. I remain outside, separated by glass, contemplating the boundary between participant and spectator. In the second image, I am immersed in a vivid, creative space devoted to research and development. The colorful wall and experimental displays evoke a sense of curiosity and excitement. Here, I am surrounded by ideas and the urge to uncover new paths, aware of the endless possibilities that arise when minds and machines converge. I feel both anticipation and a subtle tension between understanding and seeking, always aware of the play between knowledge and mystery.
